subject: Next Steps — AI Pilot Proposal for Waterloo Public Library
body:
Hello Sarah Chen,

Following up on our discussion about a potential AI literacy pilot for Waterloo Public Library.

Based on our conversation during "Internal Staff Readiness Check-in", I have prepared a proposal outline for a small-scale pilot program. The pilot would focus on practical, low-risk applications with clear human oversight.

Would you be available for a brief meeting to walk through the proposal and discuss next steps?

I look forward to your thoughts.

Best regards,
Nobuki Matsui

subject: Exploring AI Literacy Support for Sustainable Waterloo Region
body:
Hello Programs Team,

I am reaching out to explore whether Sustainable Waterloo Region may benefit from practical AI literacy and workflow improvement support.

Based on your organization's profile as a Environmental nonprofit organization:
Supports organizations with sustainability programs and regional environmental leadership.

A conversation could help identify small, useful opportunities to support your team's work while keeping human review at the center of every decision.

Would you be open to a brief introductory conversation?

Best regards,
Nobuki Matsui

subject: Recap — Staff Workflow Review — Waterloo Public Library
body:
Hello Sarah Chen,

Thank you for the productive conversation during our meeting on 2026-07-02 regarding "Staff Workflow Review".

Key outcome: Identified documentation workflow as top candidate for AI assistance

As agreed, next steps include: Prepare a workflow mapping session
We discussed following up around 2026-07-16.

I have attached a summary of our discussion for your reference. Please let me know if anything was missed or if priorities have shifted.

Looking forward to continuing this work together.

Best regards,
Nobuki Matsui
